title: Fatty Gooey Polish Sugar Pierogi
description: A traditional Polish dish made with muscovado sugar and a special pounding technique. This recipe is FODMAP-friendly.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and potato starch in a bowl. Pound dough with a mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes to develop gluten. Knead for 5 minutes until smooth. Wrap and rest for 30 minutes. Divide dough into 8 pieces. Roll each piece thinly into a circle. Place a tablespoon of muscovado sugar in the center of each circle. Fold and press edges to seal. Boil in water for 5 minutes. Fry in hot oil until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
